c.d: How intuitive and user-friendly the app is for sending broadcast messages.
The ability to personalize messages with contact details (e.g., name) for individual sending.
Features for managing and segmenting contacts for targeted broadcasting.
The ability to schedule messages for sending at a later date and time.
The cost-effectiveness of the app, considering free trials, subscription fees, and pay-per-message options.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Developer Website

c.d: Maximum number of recipients allowed per broadcast message.
c.s: Terms of service, Pricing plan details

c.d: Percentage of messages successfully delivered to recipients.
Tools and features for ensuring compliance with SMS marketing regulations (e.g., opt-in/opt-out management).
The availability of reporting and analytics on message delivery, open rates, and other key metrics.
Compatibility with other CRM, marketing automation, and business tools.
